overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a cobblestone path transitioning from a sunny lakeside promenade to a misty swamp. The character moves steadily through changing natural environments with dynamic lighting and atmospheric fog effects.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the lakeside path with two swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: calm blue lake water visible beyond a stone embankment
low stone wall separating the path from the lake
tall white-barked trees with green foliage
irregular stone paving stones forming the walkway

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit cobblestone path beside a calm lake. The stone embankment lines the right side while birch trees stand on the left. The sky is partly cloudy with bright natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail transitioning to misty swamp

events.description: atmospheric mist becomes visible as the environment transitions from lakeside to swamp
vegetation changes from healthy green trees to swampy growth and dead trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the environment becomes more enclosed with increasing mist and denser vegetation

entered.detail: tall reeds and marsh grass growing along the path edge
leafless gnarled trees characteristic of swamp environments
vertical wooden posts marking the path boundary
low-lying fog reducing visibility in the distance

segments.scene_description: The path transitions from open lakeside to enclosed forest. Mist begins to obscure the distance as the vegetation becomes denser and more swamp-like. Wooden posts appear along the right side of the path.

events.description: standing swamp water becomes visible on both sides of the cobblestone path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the misty swamp with murky water encroaching on both sides of the path

entered.detail: murky stagnant water with reeds growing at the edges
decaying logs and driftwood scattered along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The environment becomes a true swamp with standing water visible on both sides of the path. Dead trees dominate the landscape and mist hangs low. Fallen logs and wooden posts mark the path through the wetlands.

scene_state.functional_zone: swamp with wooden fortifications and bridge

events.description: wooden fences and barricades appear, indicating a fortified or constructed area
approaching a wooden bridge structure crossing the swamp water

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching wooden fortifications and a bridge structure in the deep swamp

entered.detail: rough-hewn wooden fence posts and rails lining the left side
crude wooden barriers and fortifications on the right side
wooden bridge structure spanning the swamp ahead

segments.scene_description: The path approaches a fortified area with wooden fences and barricades. A wooden bridge structure becomes visible ahead, suggesting a crossing point over the swamp. The atmosphere remains misty with dense dead trees surrounding the constructed elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a sunlit lakeside promenade gradually transforms into a desolate, misty swamp. It begins with Geralt walking along a bright cobblestone path flanked by a calm lake and birch trees under a partly cloudy sky. As the path leads away from the water, the open landscape closes in and the lighting dims, with dense vegetation and a creeping mist beginning to obscure the distance. The scene then shifts into a true wetland where standing water and dead trees dominate the surroundings, while fallen logs and wooden posts mark the way through the low-hanging fog. Finally, the camera approaches a fortified area of wooden fences and barricades, moving toward a bridge structure that cuts through the surrounding thicket of dead trees.
